original_image_tags: Red ink stamp: "RECEIVED RECORDS SECTION Oct 11   10 42 '50"
Blue ink stamp: "U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE FBI RECEIVED MR. JONES. Oct 11   3 42 PM '50"

elements.description: Multiple ink stamps and handwritten annotations on an off-white page. Visible stamps include 'MR. JONES. OCT 11 3 42 PM '50 RECEIVED FBI' (blue), 'RECEIVED RECORDS SECTION Oct 11 11 42 '50' (red), and faint blue stamps reading 'RECORDED - 152' and 'INDEXED - 152'. There is also a faint, illegible handwritten annotation in the bottom left corner. The rest of the page contains very faint, illegible bleed-through handwriting from the reverse side.

judge.reason: Description B adds specific quoted stamp text ('MR. JONES. OCT 11 3 42 PM '50 RECEIVED FBI', 'RECORDED - 152', 'INDEXED - 152') and handwritten annotations that Description A does not see or quote, creating contradictions in the number and content of visual elements.
